title: Snowdown Essentials
description: Adds western type armor for the Snowdown Project by TripleTwo Studios
body: # What's in this mod? Snowdown Essentials adds Leather, Iron, Gold, Diamond and Netherite armor in a western style # Why should you install this mod? Since it's needed for the Minecraft project "Snowdown" by TripleTwo Studios # Requirements - Fabric Api: https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api - Geckolib: https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib # Credits **Models + Minecraft Project:** [TripleTwo Studios](https://www.youtube.com/@tripletwostudios) **Coder:** [Pvp-man](https://github.com/Pvp-man51)
